meaning: vt.击,打,用拳头连续揍n.(=pommel)(刀把或剑柄的)圆头,球壮末端,(马鞍的)前鞍桥
examples: Intense hurricane winds pummel the shoreline.
Pummel now only has one rank and no longer causes damage.
Stop beating me up. Don't let your inner voice pummel your spirit.
QE3 would pummel the dollar propelling stock and commodity prices up in nominal terms.
Many spammers pummel online databases with thousands of requests in an attempt to build up files on users.
